title_variants: Spacious Liverpool Apartment Near City Center
2-Bed Entire Home in City Center with Free Parking
analysis.rewritten_desc: Fully self-contained 2-bedroom apartment in the heart of Liverpool, just a 5-minute walk to the train station and major attractions. Sleeps 4 guests in modern, light-filled living spaces spanning 70m² across two floors. Unbeatable location for exploring the Albert Dock, Royal Liver Building, and Liverpool Cathedral. The property features free on-site parking (walkers' alert: no stairs required to access this ground-floor parking). While not labeled explicitly, all standard essentials are included in the rate. Host Robert has prepared the unit specifically for short-term rentals, ensuring all appliances and security measures are in place for your safety. The calendar is refreshingly open for 76 nights in the next 90 days - perfect for travelers seeking flexibility. Book early to secure nights in this high-demand location.
analysis.photo_order_rec: Use the exterior photo of the building as the cover image - location visibility is the strongest differentiator for this urban property, and first impressions matter most in Liverpool's competitive market.
key_diagnosis: Title fails SEO best practices (63 characters vs 50 max recommended) and lacks clear hierarchy - current title includes 5 pipe-separated elements that should be simplified to 2-3 core features
